company_identity.profile: Technology Solution Provider with a full-stack digital platform for lending, enabling banks in their assets businesses.
company_identity.market_scope: Designed to support all loan journeys across the consumer and business spectrum.

strategic_north_star.Boardroom Goal: Achieve 400 cr revenue by FY28 | Atleast 70% Gross Margin by FY27 | 1 Billion USD valuation by FY28

active: Aggressive Growth: (New Logo acquisition, market share)
Churn Defense: (Retention, CSAT recovery, competitive defense)
dormant: Path to Profitability: (Burn reduction, EBITDA focus)
Margin Expansion: (COGS optimization, moving from Bespoke to SaaS)

the_whisper_layer.Sales Narrative: Delayed implementations have damaged market perception, hindering new sales. Product claims readiness but execution takes too long.
the_whisper_layer.Implementation Narrative: Delays are driven by client-side requirement changes, not internal execution.
the_whisper_layer.Product Narrative: Product is best-in-class; Sales is simply failing to close.
the_whisper_layer.Management Narrative: Complete delivery failure by Product and Implementation; top management changes are being initiated.
the_whisper_layer.Strategy Narrative: Fixed-fee models are failing for large lenders; professional services model required for customization. Sales team is too small and founder-dependent.

motivation_audit.Sales: Flat payout basis wins; at least 8% of new revenue as incentive.
motivation_audit.CSM: Flat payout basis wins; at least 6% of new revenue as incentive.
motivation_audit.Product: No incentive for the product VPs or leaders.
motivation_audit.Implementations: No incentive for the implementation VPs or leaders.

institutional_memory.Historical Promises: Forecasts missed every quarter; achieving only 60% of budgeted revenue.
institutional_memory.Past Pivot: Return to founder-led sales 12 months ago; no success to date. Currently hiring sales reps.

market_and_competitive_intelligence: Severe pricing pressures for smaller lenders; outbid even on 50L deals.
SalesForce eating enterprise market by bundling all journeys.
Nucleus strongly positioned in LMS with heavy financial muscle.
